author: nero_eth
content:
Yes that's true. Since big blocks from calldata and big blocks from big BALs are exclusive (you can either use your available gas for calldata OR state access/writes) we should end up in a additive worst-case.
What test are causing those issues?
The worst-case uncompressed block size is at ~5.72 MiB today at 60M gas, so, we still have some room before hitting the 8 MiB cap.
